---
title: "Foundations of ML/AI for Genomics"
sidebar: slides
---


[ [Download](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1wp9KloyNZkWxgzQ9SJZ5SgKm_EjUo7-0w6C0IH4kygo/edit?usp=sharing) ] &nbsp; &nbsp; [ [Tutorial](https://girke.bioinformatics.ucr.edu/GEN242/tutorials/ml/ml_tutorial_index.html) ]

<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vRDC2SptSOYUy4srZkw2haGI4ty0ydDegGpxaxw2UebDXl54ugEz00Nzlw0OBtI6jeENZf0akaHkQ99/pubembed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" frameborder="0" width="960" height="569" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
